ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trucks" (
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each truck */,
  "truck_model" TEXT /* Model of the truck */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate of the truck */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Load capacity of the truck in tons */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the truck (e.g., active, in maintenance, retired) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the truck was purchased */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "mileage" REAL /* Current mileage of the truck */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel the truck uses */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the last inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("truck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location record */,
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the truck associated with the location record */,
  "recorded_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the location was recorded */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the truck's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the truck's location */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the truck at the recorded time */,
  "location_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the GPS location */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the GPS device */,
  "is_parked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the truck is parked */,
  "fuel_level" REAL /* Fuel level of the truck at the recorded time */,
  "engine_status" TEXT /* Status of the engine (e.g., running, stopped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_truck_id FOREIGN KEY ("truck_id") REFERENCES trucks ("truck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the driver */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the driver (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the driver was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the driver was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  "driver_license_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the driver's license */,
  "total_hours_driven" REAL /* Total hours driven by the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment record */,
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the truck assigned */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver assigned */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the assignment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the assignment */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route assigned to the driver */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance of the assigned route */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated time of delivery for the assignment */,
  "actual_delivery_time" TEXT /* Actual time of delivery for the assignment */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery (e.g., on time, delayed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_truck_id FOREIGN KEY ("truck_id") REFERENCES trucks ("truck_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the truck that underwent maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost incurred for the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mechanic who performed the maintenance */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* List of parts replaced during the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_truck_id FOREIGN KEY ("truck_id") REFERENCES trucks ("truck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Start location of the route */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* End location of the route */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance of the route */,
  "estimated_time" REAL /* Estimated time to complete the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)
